projectDescription: A React-based web application for creating professional CV profiles and exporting them as PDF or JSON using Modern and Classic templates.
keyFeatures: Multi-profile management with persistent state via Zustand
Two CV templates: Modern (two-column dark sidebar) and Classic (formal typographic)
PDF export using html2pdf.js with A4 format and 2x canvas scale
JSON export for profile data portability
Form validation with Zod including date range checks and required field enforcement
Responsive design with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui components
publicApiSurface: useProfileStore — Zustand store: profiles, selectedProfileId, showForm, addProfile, selectProfile, openForm, closeForm, goBack
profileFormSchema — Zod schema for profile form validation
Profile interface: id, nombre, correo, numero, fechaNacimiento, experiencia[], educacion[], habilidades
Experience interface: empresa, puesto, inicio, fin, descripcion
Education interface: institucion, titulo, inicio, fin
ModernTemplate component — two-column CV with dark sidebar
ClassicTemplate component — single-column formal CV layout
